ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (a:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'}),
    p2 = (a)-[r2:DIRECTED {roles: ['Director']}]->(b:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'}), (a)-[r3:ACTED_IN]->(c:Movie {title: 'The Departed'}),
    p3 = (b)-[r4:REVIEWED]->(d:Movie {title: 'The Departed'} {reviewed_by: 'Scorsese Review'}) {rating: 9}
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: What are the key themes in Martin Scorsese’s directed roles, particularly how his critiques of "The Departed" reflect broader cultural critiques he’s known for?

cypher:
MATCH (p:Person {name: "Martin Scorsese"})-[:DIRECTED]->(m:Movie {title: "The Departed"})
WITH p, m
MATCH (p)-[:DIRECTED]->(m)<-[:REVIEWED]-(r:Person)-[:REVIEWED]->(m2:Movie)
RETURN p.name AS Director, m.title AS Movie, r.name AS Reviewer, r.summary AS ReviewSummary
